name: marketingskills_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the marketingskills capability.

prompts.name: seo_optimization_prompt
prompts.template: Optimize the following content for SEO using these keywords: {seo_keywords}. Content: {content_text}
prompts.use_case: Enhancing digital marketing campaigns via AI-powered copywriting and SEO optimization.

prompts.name: conversion_rate_analysis_prompt
prompts.template: Analyze this marketing campaign data to provide conversion rate improvement insights: {campaign_data}
prompts.use_case: Generating actionable insights from marketing analytics to increase conversion rates.

prompts.name: growth_strategy_development_prompt
prompts.template: Given these analytics and current growth strategies, suggest a detailed growth engineering plan: {analytics_data}, {growth_strategies}
prompts.use_case: Developing growth engineering strategies for startups and established businesses.

prompts.name: copywriting_improvement_prompt
prompts.template: Improve the following marketing copy to maximize engagement and clarity: {content_text}
prompts.use_case: Automating content creation workflows tailored for various marketing channels.
